Morris Museum of Art.fail_implement: As of March 26, 2026, the official calendar and direct event URLs return a Cloudflare "Just a moment..." verification flow in direct HTTP, and a Playwright browser session reaches the same security interstitial instead of event content, so there is no stable first-party event payload available from this environment.

Museum of Contemporary Art of Georgia.failed_test_comment: As of March 26, 2026, the official special-events page reports "No Current or Upcoming Events," and the museum's official Tribe endpoint returns an empty upcoming-events payload, so a dry run currently parses 0 upcoming qualifying rows.

SCAD Museum of Art.fail_implement: As of March 26, 2026, direct HTTP requests to the official programs page are blocked by a Cloudflare challenge and a Playwright browser session still lands on an "Attention Required! | Cloudflare" block page, so there is no stable official HTML or JSON program feed to parse from this environment.
